user.title: Select Keypad
user.description: Found {count} keypad(s) on your Lutron bridge. Select the one you want to configure.

confirm.title: Confirm Keypad

error.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration is not loaded. Set it up first.
error.device_not_found: Selected device could not be found. Try again.

abort.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration must be set up before adding keypads.

init.title: Configure {name}
init.description: Select a button to configure, or choose Save & Close when done.

button.title: Button {button_number} — {keypad_name}
button.description: Set the label and action type for this button.

bulk.title: Bulk Edit — {keypad_name}
bulk.description: Select the buttons to edit and the action type to apply to all of them.

bulk_entity.title: Bulk Edit — {keypad_name}
bulk_entity.description: Choose the target entity to apply to {button_count} button(s) as **{action_type}**.
